blocks.text: Wærenskjold Eyes Glory as Belgian Spring Classics Roll Into Wednesday

Monday is a breather before the storm. Eyes are already turning to Wednesday's Dwars door Vlaanderen, where Søren Wærenskjold carries Norwegian hopes on the cobbles. Two ATP 250 clay openers warm up, but the real action is days away.
⛳ PGA Tour Houston Open continues — Nicolai Højgaard one shot off the lead at -17, chasing his first PGA title
